\tzpentry{ID4167}{Vacuum Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4167 introduces Vacuum Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho_{\text{vacuum}} = \frac{1}{2}\sum_{\text{modes}}\hbar\omega \approx \frac{\hbar\omega_{\text{Planck}}}{2 \ell_{\text{Planck}}^{3}}, \end{equation}
